ats_utilities.logging.component_bundle module¶

Module

component_bundle.py

Copyright

Info

Defines component bundle data classe for dependency group simplification. Encapsulates logging components to minimize constructor overhead.

class ats_utilities.logging.component_bundle.LoggingComponentBundle(*, logger: ILogger | None = None, logger_bundle: LoggerBundle | None = None, context_bundle: ContextBundle | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Defines component bundle data classe for dependency group simplification. Encapsulates logging components to minimize constructor overhead.

It defines:

attributes:
logger - Logger instance (default None).
logger_bundle - Bundle with logger parameters (default None).
context_bundle - Bundle with context (default None).
methods:
__post_init__ - Post-initialization hook for automatic component creation.
validate - Validates that LoggingComponentBundle is valid (can be called after merge).
merge - Merges non-None values from another LoggingComponentBundle into this one.
to_dict - Converts the LoggingComponentBundle instance to a dictionary.
context_bundle: ContextBundle | None¶
logger: ILogger | None¶
logger_bundle: LoggerBundle | None¶
merge(other: LoggingComponentBundle) → None[source]¶

Merges non-None values from another LoggingComponentBundle into this one.

Parameters:

other (<LoggingComponentBundle>) – Another LoggingComponentBundle to merge into this one.

Exceptions:
ATSTypeError: Other must be a LoggingComponentBundle instance.
to_dict() → dict[str, Any][source]¶

Converts the LoggingComponentBundle instance to a dictionary.

Returns:

Dictionary representation of the LoggingComponentBundle instance.

Return type:

<dict[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.

validate() → None[source]¶

Validates that LoggingComponentBundle is valid (can be called after merge). Performs validation of logger, logger_bundle and context_bundle attributes. Logger must be non-None and an instance of ILogger interface. Logger bundle must be non-None. Context bundle must be non-None.

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Logger must be provided.
ATSValueError: Logger bundle must be provided.
ATSValueError: Context bundle must be provided.
ATSTypeError: Logger must be an instance of ILogger interface.
ATSTypeError: Logger bundle must be an instance of LoggerBundle.
ATSTypeError: Context bundle must be an instance of ContextBundle.
